name: Mineralys Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Part I Business Overview We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing medicines to target diseases driven by dysregulated aldosterone. Our product candidate, lorundrostat, is a proprietary, orally administered, highly selective aldosterone synthase inhibitor (ASI) that we are developing for the treatment of cardiorenal conditions affected by dysregulated aldosterone, including hypertension and related comorbidities such as chronic kidney disease (CKD) and obstructive sleep apnea (OSA...
